text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WHOOOAAA! That! Was! So! So! COOOOOL!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This was a graded race, right?! How did she manage to win by over
ten lengths?!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it either! I know she's good, but ten is too good to be real!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it either! I know she's good, but ten is too good to be real!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we all have that kind of strength inside us... We've just
decided that it's impossible.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ooooh! This makes me wanna run! Think I can join a race right now?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I don't think that's possible, but I understand the
feeling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After all... she's shown us a a way of running that we all wrote off as
mere fantasy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this year's Kinko Sho, Silence Suzuka gives racing fans a truly
awe-inspiring performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's not just the fans who are wide-eyed with wonder. Suzuka has
just shown every racer that their greatest dreams can indeed become
reality.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Seriously? That had to be the best race I've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: No kidding! There's no telling what she'll do next!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: That Silence Suzuka's in a league of her own!

If my theory is correct, she holds the answers I've searched high and
low for...
